1-4-1-1.label: ConsumerAdapter 基座与 Contract Plan Review Artifact Runner

decisions.q: Roadmap Activation review-artifact runner 第一阶段是否复用现有 deterministic contract-plan 逻辑？
decisions.answer: 是。第一阶段直接复用现有 Roadmap Activation contract-plan 逻辑生成 contract-plan.json，并把 adapter result 写入 orchestration envelope；该子节点不得创建 git branch、PR/MR 或执行其他 live side effects。
decisions.note: This keeps the first child slice useful and deterministic while preserving the parent node as the full live Roadmap Activation target.

decisions.q: Roadmap Activation contract-plan 输入字段缺失时，ConsumerAdapter 应该自动补齐还是停下？
decisions.answer: 默认自动补齐低风险字段：activation_request_id 优先取 payload.activation_request_id，否则由 signal_id 或 deterministic hash 派生；source_issue_url 优先取 subject.url，缺失但 provider/subject id 足够时可构造；source_comment_url 优先取 payload.source_comment_url 或 payload.activation_request_comment_url，缺失时不得伪造，必须 hard stop 并输出需要 activation request comment URL 的结构化 next steps。
decisions.note: This preserves automation-default behavior while keeping activation evidence replayable and non-fabricated.

decisions.q: consumer_adapter_result 应该采用什么固定结构，才能支持回放、doctor 和 closeout？
decisions.answer: 采用固定 schema: zj-loop.consumer_adapter_result.v1。结果必须包含 route_id、consumer、consumer_kind、adapter_status、review_artifacts[]、repairs_applied[]、live_side_effects、next_steps；hard stop 时同字段写 adapter_status=hard_stopped 和结构化 stop_signal。review_artifacts 必须是数组；repairs_applied 固定记录自动补齐；live_side_effects.attempted=false 必须明确写出，防止其他 Agent 误以为已经创建 PR/MR 或执行 live side effects。
decisions.note: This creates a stable adapter boundary for replay, diagnostics, and post-merge closeout handoff.

decisions.q: Roadmap Activation review artifact contract-plan.json 应该写到哪里？
decisions.answer: 写到 orchestration 专属目录：zj-loop/orchestrations/<orchestration_id>/contract-plan.json；envelope 本体继续保留在 zj-loop/orchestrations/<orchestration_id>.json。consumer_adapter_result.review_artifacts[].path 写相对路径。
decisions.note: This keeps the main orchestration envelope and its review artifacts in one replayable namespace without polluting the project root.

1-4-1-1.notes: Completed: added ConsumerAdapter/runConsumerToReviewArtifact base for roadmap-sliced-development review-artifact execution. Dispatch now writes contract-plan.json under zj-loop/orchestrations/<orchestration_id>/, records consumer_adapter_result, applies low-risk input repairs, hard-stops missing activation request comment URL, and never performs live branch/PR side effects in this child slice.

1-4-1-2.label: Roadmap Branch PR Live Side Effect Runner

decisions.q: Roadmap Branch PR Live Side Effect Runner 是否要一次性覆盖 GitHub + GitLab？
decisions.answer: 要。一次性补齐 GitHub PR 和 GitLab MR 两个平台的 live adapter，但必须保持 provider-specific adapter，而不是做泛 Git provider。协议统一，provider 实现分开：executeRoadmapActivationLiveSideEffects 内部分发到 executeGitHubRoadmapActivation / executeGitLabRoadmapActivation；不支持的平台 hard stop；所有 live side effect 都必须写入 consumer_adapter_result.live_side_effects。
decisions.note: contract-plan 已经 provider-neutral；live side effects 的 API、权限、token、target branch、draft/review 字段都是 provider-specific。

decisions.q: zj-loop-dispatch --mode auto 的默认行为应如何与 ZAgenticLoop + Codex Harness scope 对齐？
decisions.answer: auto 的默认行为与 ZAgenticLoop + Codex Harness 的 scope 对齐：自动推进到当前 loop/harness 能独立承担的 bounded review artifact 或 hard stop。GitHub/GitLab 属于 (ZAgenticLoop + Codex Harness) + External Tool 中的 External Tool；其 branch/PR/MR live writes 必须通过 --mode execute 和 provider-specific adapter 显式进入，不作为 auto 默认行为。
decisions.note: This resolves the tension between automation-default product experience and external provider side effects: default automation continues inside the harness scope; provider writes require explicit external-tool execution scope.

decisions.q: execute mode 是否还需要 human 固定确认短语？
decisions.answer: 不再额外要求 human 固定确认短语；route enable 阶段已经承担 side-effect authorization。execute mode 可以进入 external-tool execution scope，但必须通过机器可审计 gates：execution_scope=external_tool、external_tool=github|gitlab、side_effect_level=branch_pr、route enabled + execution-ready、provider token/permission present、contract-plan schema valid、branch prefix zjal-、target branch explicit、idempotency key / existing PR/MR lookup、no auto-merge。
decisions.note: This avoids step-by-step human friction while keeping external provider writes explicit, auditable, and bounded.

decisions.q: execute mode 的 contract-plan 输入应从哪里获取？
decisions.answer: 优先复用当前 orchestration 的 review artifact，不要求用户再传路径。auto mode 先生成 zj-loop/orchestrations/<id>.json 和 zj-loop/orchestrations/<id>/contract-plan.json；execute mode 对同一个 signal 命中 existing orchestration，读取 consumer_adapter_result.review_artifacts 中的 contract-plan，执行 provider-specific live adapter，并更新同一个 envelope 的 consumer_adapter_result.live_side_effects。没有 existing orchestration 或没有 contract-plan 时 hard stop，提示先跑 auto 或提供可回放 orchestration。
decisions.note: This keeps the loop smooth and replayable without asking humans to shuttle artifact paths between steps.

decisions.q: live_side_effects 的成功与失败结果是否需要统一 provider-neutral 外壳？
decisions.answer: 需要。不是做泛 Git provider，而是统一外层 envelope + provider-specific details。live_side_effects 必须包含 attempted、execution_scope=external_tool、external_tool、side_effect_level=branch_pr、status、idempotency_key、review(kind/number/url)、branch(name/target)、operations[]、provider_result；失败或拒绝时写 status=failed|refused 和 refusals[]。doctor/replay/closeout 读取统一字段，GitHub/GitLab adapter 在 provider_result 中保留各自细节。
decisions.note: Closeout should not need to know provider API details; it should consume review, branch, status, and operation evidence.

decisions.q: GitHub live adapter 应该用 gh CLI 还是 GitHub REST API？
decisions.answer: 使用 GitHub REST API + fetchImpl，不依赖 gh CLI。GitLab 现有 live executor 已经是 REST API + fetchImpl，GitHub 也对齐这个模式。GitHub adapter 需要检查 repository、target_branch、GITHUB_TOKEN 或显式 token；通过 API 查 target branch ref、find/create branch ref、find existing open PR by head branch、create/update PR body/title；不得 merge、approve 或改 label。
decisions.note: Provider-specific adapter remains: GitHub uses GitHub REST API, GitLab uses GitLab REST API; tests can mock fetchImpl without shelling out.

1-4-1-2.notes: Completed: dispatch execute mode now reuses existing orchestration contract-plan artifacts, runs provider-specific Roadmap Activation live side effects for GitHub and GitLab, writes normalized live_side_effects evidence, hard-stops missing replayable orchestration, and refuses missing provider token before API calls. auto mode remains review-artifact-only.

1-4-1-3.label: Roadmap Activation Resume Failure Recovery Runner

decisions.q: failed 后恢复是否要区分 recoverable failure 与 terminal activation failure？
decisions.answer: 必须区分。recoverable failure 可复用同一个 orchestration 与 contract-plan 继续 resume/execute；terminal activation failure 不允许原地 retry，应输出 activation-failed 或 needs_protocol_repair，并要求新的 activation request 或修复输入后进入新链路。
decisions.note: 区分临时 provider/permission/API 失败与语义、schema、source traceability、route enable、安全边界类失败，避免坏 request 自动反复消费，同时减少可恢复失败导致的重复 activation。

decisions.q: recoverable failure 的 resume 是否允许自动再次执行 provider live side effects？
decisions.answer: 允许自动再次执行，但只在同一个 execute 调用里发生；resume 本身只回放 stored orchestration、contract-plan、上次失败分类与推荐下一步，不产生 GitHub/GitLab live side effects。execute 命中 recoverable failure 且 gates 重新通过时，可复用同一个 contract-plan 重试 live adapter。
decisions.note: 保持 resume 读操作语义，避免隐藏外部副作用；同时让 execute 承担自动恢复体验。重复失败需要记录 attempt evidence，并受 retry budget / failure classification 约束，避免无限循环。

decisions.q: recoverable failure 的 retry budget 应该如何设计？
decisions.answer: 采用固定上限 + failure reason 分级。相同 orchestration_id + contract_plan_digest + external_tool 最多 3 次 live attempt；permission/token missing 记录 refused attempt 但不消耗 provider API retry；network/5xx/rate limit 作为 recoverable attempt；4xx contract/API validation、invalid branch prefix、missing source traceability、contract schema invalid 等直接 terminal。
decisions.note: 保持策略足够简单，避免无限循环，同时为 zj-loop-doctor 从 attempts 中总结失败模式留下结构化证据。

decisions.q: live_side_effects.attempts[] 应保存完整 provider response 还是低成本审计字段？
decisions.answer: 只保存低成本审计字段，不保存完整 provider response。attempt 记录 attempt_id、attempt_number、attempted_at、mode、external_tool、operation、status、failure_class、reason、http_status、retry_consumed、next_retry_allowed、idempotency_key、review_url、branch_name、provider_request_id 等必要字段。
decisions.note: 完整 response 不落盘，避免 token/header/隐私数据进入 repo，也避免 orchestration JSON 膨胀；provider_result 继续保留最终态摘要，attempts 用稳定小结构服务 replay/doctor。

decisions.q: 部分成功后下次 execute 应如何恢复？
decisions.answer: 必须 idempotent resume，不能重复粗暴创建。contract-plan 的 branch.name 与 idempotency_key 是恢复锚点；下次 execute 先 provider preflight，branch 已存在则复用，PR/MR 已存在则 update existing review，branch 存在但 review 不存在则只补 create review。branch 存在但 commit/target 不符合 contract-plan 时 terminal hard stop。
decisions.note: 覆盖 create_branch 成功但 create PR/MR 失败的高频真实场景；attempts 必须能展示已完成步骤、复用步骤与本次补齐步骤，避免重复 branch/review。

decisions.q: ConsumerAdapter failure 是否必须生成外部可见 activation lifecycle evidence？
decisions.answer: 两层都要，但本刀先做本地 orchestration 为 truth，外部 comment 生成 review artifact，不直接 live 写回。orchestration JSON 负责 replay/doctor；activation-lifecycle evidence artifact 负责让 GitHub/GitLab issue comment 或其他 Agent 能看到 failure/resume handoff。
decisions.note: 1-4-1-3 聚焦 resume/failure recovery runner，不扩大到 provider comment live write；review artifact 应包含 activation_state、failure_class、attempt_count、next_command、resume_allowed、retry_budget_remaining、where_to_continue 等字段。

decisions.q: ConsumerAdapter 是否要为 recovery 增加更细 adapter_status？
decisions.answer: 要增加，但保持小集合。adapter_status 扩展为 executed_to_review_artifact、executed_to_live_side_effects、resumable、failed、hard_stopped；外层 orchestration status 仍保持 dispatched、duplicate、hard_stopped、resume 等少量状态，细粒度放在 consumer_adapter_result.adapter_status / activation_lifecycle。
decisions.note: 避免破坏现有 orchestration 读取方，同时让 Roadmap Activation 的 resume/failure recovery 语义可被 doctor、replay 和后续 closeout/evidence promotion 稳定消费。

1-4-1-3.notes: Implemented ConsumerAdapter resume/failure recovery: recoverable vs terminal classification, low-cost live_side_effect attempts, activation lifecycle evidence artifact, resumable execute retry, idempotent partial GitHub branch success recovery, and terminal invalid contract handling. Verification: tools/zj-loop-core npm test passed 161/161; git diff --check passed.

1-4-1-4.label: Roadmap Activation Post Merge Closeout Handoff

decisions.q: Roadmap Activation Post Merge Closeout Handoff 应该产出在哪里？
decisions.answer: 两层都要，但主 truth 放在 orchestration review artifact，PR/MR body 继续只承载 post-merge contract。execute 成功创建/更新 PR/MR 后，ConsumerAdapter 额外生成 zj-loop/orchestrations/<id>/post-merge-closeout-handoff.json，显式交给 post-merge-roadmap-closeout。
decisions.note: PR/MR body 作为 closeout runner 的安全 contract 载体；orchestration handoff artifact 作为 Codex/Human/其他 Agent 可回放的下一棒说明，不在本刀执行 live cleanup，也不直接写 provider comment。

decisions.q: post-merge-closeout-handoff 是否在 resumable/failed 时也生成？
decisions.answer: 只在 review 成功存在时生成 closeout handoff；resumable/failed 继续用 activation lifecycle evidence。closeout 的前提是已有未来会 merge 的 PR/MR，必须有 review.url 和 branch；未成功创建 review 时生成 closeout handoff 会误导 Agent。
decisions.note: activation-lifecycle-evidence 负责恢复/失败处理；post-merge-closeout-handoff 负责 PR/MR 已开后的 merge 后收尾。

decisions.q: handoff artifact 是否要直接提供 zj-loop-post-merge-closeout 固定命令？
decisions.answer: 要，必须给固定命令数组，但同时保留结构化字段。handoff 应包含 dry_run_command.args[]、live_closeout_command.args[]、provider、review、repository/project_path、carrier_issue、branch、contract_source 等字段。
decisions.note: Human 可以直接复制固定命令，Agent 可读结构化字段，避免从自然语言猜测；GitHub/GitLab 命令按 provider 分别生成。

decisions.q: GitLab live closeout 尚未完整支持时 handoff 应如何表达？
decisions.answer: 不要伪装成可 live，必须结构化标记 unavailable；dry-run 仍给固定命令。GitHub live_closeout_command.available=true；GitLab 若 live cleanup 尚未完整支持，则 live_closeout_command.available=false，reason=gitlab-live-closeout-not-supported-yet，并给出 manual cleanup next_step。
decisions.note: 避免其他 Agent 误以为可以自动删除 GitLab branch 或 close issue；GitLab live closeout 能力应后续专门补齐，不在本刀扩大 destructive side effects。

1-4-1-4.notes: Implemented post-merge closeout handoff generation after successful Roadmap Activation PR/MR creation. ConsumerAdapter now writes post-merge-closeout-handoff.json only when review exists, with structured provider/review/branch/carrier fields and fixed dry-run/live closeout command arrays. GitLab live closeout is explicitly marked unavailable with follow-up node 1-4-1-6. Verification: tools/zj-loop-core npm test passed 161/161; git diff --check passed.

1-4-1-5.label: Roadmap Activation Evidence Promotion Gate

decisions.q: Evidence Promotion Gate 提升的对象是什么？
decisions.answer: 提升的是 Route Table / consumer capability 中 Roadmap Activation 这条链路的 maturity 声明，而不是单次 orchestration 状态。单次运行证据继续放在 zj-loop/orchestrations/<id>/...；promotion gate 读取并校验多类 evidence 后，才允许把 roadmap-sliced-development / Roadmap Activation ConsumerAdapter 推到更高 maturity，例如 execution-ready。
decisions.note: Gate 失败输出缺口清单且不修改 maturity；Gate 成功才允许更新 Route Table 或对应 consumer capability 声明。适合固化为确定性脚本/API。

decisions.q: Promotion Gate 的最小硬证据集是什么？
decisions.answer: 升到 execution-ready 至少要四类 evidence 全部存在且 schema 可校验：contract-plan.json；provider live side effect evidence；activation-lifecycle-evidence.json；post-merge-closeout-handoff.json。GitLab live closeout 当前可标记 unavailable + follow-up node，但字段不能缺。
decisions.note: 判断结果必须结构化：promotable、target_maturity、required_evidence、missing_evidence、failed_checks、next_steps、promotion_command。

decisions.q: Promotion Gate 是否直接修改 Route Table？
decisions.answer: 默认不直接修改，只输出 promotion_command；只有显式 --apply 且带固定确认短语时才写入。默认命令只检查 evidence 并输出 promotable、缺口与命令；写入命令必须复用现有 promote 语义。
decisions.note: 显式写入只修改 maturity.runner，不自动 enable route，不修改 protocol maturity；execution-ready 确认短语固定为 promote roadmap-sliced-development runner to execution-ready。

decisions.q: Promotion Gate 应该从哪里自动发现 evidence？
decisions.answer: 默认从 zj-loop/orchestrations/ 自动扫描最近的 Roadmap Activation orchestration，不要求用户传 4 个文件路径；同时支持 --orchestration <id> 收窄到单次运行。默认只接受 route_id 与 consumer_adapter_result.route_id 均为 roadmap-sliced-development 的 orchestration。
decisions.note: Promotion 级别判断允许跨多个 orchestration 聚合 success path、recoverable failure、terminal failure 等证据；每条 evidence 必须记录 orchestration_id、artifact path、schema/kind、check result，保证可回放。

decisions.q: Promotion Gate 的确定性入口叫什么、放在哪里？
decisions.answer: 放在 @jununfly/zj-loop-core 现有 zj-loop-route CLI 里，新增子命令 promotion-gate。默认命令为 zj-loop-route promotion-gate roadmap-sliced-development --target execution-ready --json；显式写入时加 --apply --confirm "promote roadmap-sliced-development runner to execution-ready" --json。
decisions.note: 它检查并可能修改 Route Table maturity，因此属于 route/consumer maturity 管理；不放进 zj-loop-dispatch 或 zj-loop-run；内部可复用现有 promoteRouteRunner，但必须先通过 promotion gate evidence checker。

1-4-1-5.notes: Implemented zj-loop-route promotion-gate for Roadmap Activation evidence promotion. The gate checks zj-loop/orchestrations for contract-plan, provider live side effect, activation-lifecycle evidence, and post-merge closeout handoff; defaults to check-only; --apply requires fixed execution-ready confirmation and only promotes maturity.runner without enabling the route. Verification: npm test in tools/zj-loop-core passed 164/164.

1-4-1-6.label: GitLab Post Merge Live Closeout 支持

decisions.q: GitLab Post Merge Live Closeout 的副作用范围是什么？
decisions.answer: 与 GitHub 一样执行两个窄副作用：删除 roadmap branch + 关闭 carrier issue。必须只处理 post-merge-closeout-handoff / merged MR contract 明确指向的 zjal- roadmap branch，只关闭 contract 里的 carrier issue，不关闭 source issue 或 linked issues。
decisions.note: 必须确认 GitLab MR 已 merged、target branch 是允许主干分支、存在 GITLAB_TOKEN；branch 已不存在或 issue 已 closed 视为 already done，不失败；不做 merge、不改 MR、不碰其他分支；所有动作写入 structured live-runner evidence。

decisions.q: GitLab live closeout 应该用 GitLab API 还是 glab CLI？
decisions.answer: 使用 GitLab API，不依赖 glab CLI。沿用 GitLab Roadmap Activation live side effects 的 API + GITLAB_TOKEN 风格，降低用户项目 CI 安装成本，并便于 deterministic tests mock fetch。
decisions.note: API 动作：GET /projects/:project/merge_requests/:iid 确认 merged 与 source/target branch；DELETE /projects/:project/repository/branches/:branch 删除 roadmap branch，404 视为 already deleted；PUT /projects/:project/issues/:iid body { state_event: close } 关闭 carrier issue，already closed 视为 already closed。

decisions.q: GitLab live closeout 的 evidence 成功语义如何定义？
decisions.answer: executor guards 全部通过，并且删除 roadmap branch 与关闭 carrier issue 两个目标资源达到目标状态时，输出 completion_form=cleanup-done / status=completed。already_deleted 与 already_closed 也算 completed，但 action 必须显式标记 result。
decisions.note: 失败/跳过语义：MR 未 merged、branch 不符合 zjal-、contract 不合法、target branch 不允许、token 缺失都输出 cleanup-skipped；API 5xx/权限失败先输出 cleanup-skipped + next_steps，不自动创建 escalation issue，避免 closeout runner 过度扩权。

1-4-1-6.notes: Implemented GitLab Post Merge Live Closeout support. The closeout runner now supports GitLab API live cleanup with GITLAB_TOKEN/JOB-TOKEN: delete the contract zjal- roadmap branch, probe and close the carrier issue, treat already_deleted/already_closed as completed, and emit cleanup-done/cleanup-skipped live-runner evidence. CLI live-closeout accepts --provider gitlab / --merge-request / GitLab token options; Roadmap Activation handoff now emits executable GitLab live closeout commands. Verification: npm test in tools/zj-loop-core passed 166/166.

1-4-3-1.label: Shared Fix Runner Promotion Gate
1-4-3-1.notes: Implemented shared Fix Runner promotion-gate evidence checks for issue-fix-request fix runners. Required evidence keys are fixed to request-carrier, claim-lifecycle, live-runner-evidence, verifier-backed-outcome, side-effect-boundary, workflow-dispatch-dogfood. CI Sweeper baseline can pass with workflow-dispatch dogfood evidence; Dependency Sweeper currently reports workflow-dispatch-dogfood as the remaining gap. Updated route consumer execution architecture docs. Verification: cd tools/zj-loop-core && npm test.

1-4-3-2.label: Dependency Sweeper Workflow-Dispatch Live Evidence

decisions.q: 未发布的 Dependency Sweeper live-repair 如何做 workflow-dispatch dogfood？
decisions.answer: 给 Dependency Sweeper workflow 增加 core_package 输入，默认保持发布包 pin；本仓未发布 dogfood 显式传 ./tools/zj-loop-core 使用当前 checkout dist。
decisions.note: 避免为了验证未发布功能而提前发版；用户项目默认路径仍使用发布包，dogfood 路径必须显式覆盖。

decisions.q: local core_package override 需要哪些额外 workflow guard？
decisions.answer: 当 core_package 以 ./ 开头时，workflow 先 npm install --prefix <local-package>；summary cat 必须先检查文件存在；artifact upload 使用 if: always() 保留失败证据。
decisions.note: 第二次 dogfood run 29233506834 暴露 local package 缺依赖和失败时 artifact 被跳过，需把这类 workflow-layer failure 也变成可回放证据。

1-4-3-2.notes: Completed Dependency Sweeper workflow-dispatch live evidence. Failed dogfood runs exposed two product defects and were fixed: run 29233185628 showed pinned npm package cannot validate unreleased live-repair; run 29233506834 showed local package dependencies and failure artifact retention were missing. Successful dogfood run https://github.com/jununfly/ZAgenticLoop/actions/runs/29234374181 used core_package=./tools/zj-loop-core, installed local deps, executed live-repair with CREATE_DEPENDENCY_SWEEPER_FIX_PR, uploaded live-repair-result.json, and produced verifier-backed escalation-issue evidence without pushing a repair branch or creating a repair PR. Check-only promotion gate now reports dependency-sweeper promotable=true; apply promotion remains deferred to 1-4-3-4. Verification: cd tools/zj-loop-init && npm test; npm run test:generated-bundle-release-gate; node tools/zj-loop-core/dist/route-cli.js promotion-gate dependency-sweeper --target execution-ready --json.

1-4-3-3.label: PR Steward Workflow-Dispatch Live Evidence
1-4-3-3.notes: Completed PR Steward workflow-dispatch live evidence. Real dogfood run https://github.com/jununfly/ZAgenticLoop/actions/runs/29237613749 used core_package=./tools/zj-loop-core, executed guarded live-repair, uploaded live-repair-result.json, and produced verifier-backed escalation-issue evidence without source PR mutation, repair branch push, repair PR creation, or auto-merge. Earlier run 29237363654 exposed invalid test carrier pr_number=0; reran with nonzero source PR. Check-only promotion gate for pr-steward-fix-request returned promotable=true after aligning evidence_store and auto_merge boundary in Route Table.

1-4-3-4.label: Apply Promotion And Docs
1-4-3-4.notes: Completed explicit promotion apply for dependency-sweeper and pr-steward-fix-request after shared fix-runner gate passed. Both now have maturity.runner=execution-ready while execution.mode remains claim-only; route enablement/live side effects remain separate guarded decisions. CI Sweeper was not promoted because check-only gate still misses explicit live-runner-evidence, so that gap stays visible instead of being forced through.

1-4-4-1.label: Shared Draft Consumer Promotion Gate

decisions.q: Draft Consumer Promotion Gate 的硬证据 key 是否固定为 6 项？
decisions.answer: 同意。固定为 draft-request-carrier、draft-lifecycle、live-runner-evidence、reviewable-draft-outcome、side-effect-boundary、workflow-dispatch-dogfood。
decisions.note: 该 gate 与 fix-runner gate 同构，但把 repair/verifier outcome 换成 draft-consumer 的 reviewable draft outcome；draft-consumer 可以生成 reviewable draft artifact / draft PR / escalation issue，但不能 tag、release、publish，也不能把 draft 当成已发布结果。

decisions.q: Draft Consumer Promotion Gate 是否复用现有 zj-loop-route promotion-gate，而不是新增命令？
decisions.answer: 复用现有 promotion-gate。
decisions.note: 实现上按 consumer_kind 分派 evidence collector：draft-consumer 使用 draft-request-carrier、draft-lifecycle、live-runner-evidence、reviewable-draft-outcome、side-effect-boundary、workflow-dispatch-dogfood；默认 check-only，只有 --apply 且固定确认短语 promote <consumer> runner to execution-ready 时才写 Route Table。

decisions.q: Draft Consumer Promotion Gate 是否接受 escalation-issue 作为 live-runner evidence，但不能作为唯一 promotion 成功依据？
decisions.answer: 需要。
decisions.note: live-runner-evidence 可接受 draft-evidence、draft-pr、escalation-issue；reviewable-draft-outcome 必须至少命中 draft-evidence 或 draft-pr。因此只跑出 escalation-issue 能证明失败路径可控，但不能证明 draft consumer 已具备可用的草稿产出能力。

1-4-4-1.notes: Implemented shared draft-consumer promotion gate through existing zj-loop-route promotion-gate. Gate now checks draft-request-carrier, draft-lifecycle, live-runner-evidence, reviewable-draft-outcome, side-effect-boundary, and workflow-dispatch-dogfood. Escalation evidence can satisfy live-runner-evidence but cannot satisfy reviewable-draft-outcome by itself.

1-4-4-2.label: Changelog Drafter Workflow-Dispatch Live Evidence

decisions.q: Changelog Drafter workflow-dispatch live evidence 的最小成功形态是否接受 draft-evidence，而不强制 draft-pr？
decisions.answer: 接受 draft-evidence，不强制必须 draft-pr。
decisions.note: 目标是证明 runner 能通过 workflow-dispatch 安全地产生 reviewable draft outcome；draft-evidence 副作用更小但能覆盖固定确认短语、request carrier、runner lifecycle、artifact upload、side-effect boundary。draft-pr 是更强证据但不是硬要求；promotion 不应只依赖 escalation-issue。

decisions.q: Changelog Drafter workflow-dispatch dogfood 是否支持 core_package=./tools/zj-loop-core 本地包覆盖？
decisions.answer: 要。默认仍用发布包版本，dogfood 时允许显式传 core_package=./tools/zj-loop-core。
decisions.note: 本地包覆盖用于验证当前分支尚未发布的 core 改动；workflow 需要在本地包模式下先 npm install --prefix ./tools/zj-loop-core，并且 artifact upload 使用 if: always()，避免失败时丢证据。

decisions.q: Changelog Drafter live evidence 是否必须证明不触碰发布侧副作用？
decisions.answer: 必须。
decisions.note: side-effect-boundary gate 必须证明 draft consumer 只生成可审查草稿，不完成发布。live result / state 应显式记录 tag_created=false、release_created=false、package_published=false、final_changelog_acceptance=false；最好由 runner result 结构化输出，并由 promotion gate 检查。

decisions.q: 是否把 final_changelog_acceptance=false 补进 Changelog Drafter runner result / tests / promotion gate 识别？
decisions.answer: 要。
decisions.note: 该字段作为 side-effect-boundary 的硬字段，明确 draft-evidence / draft-pr 只是可审查草稿，不代表最终 changelog 已接受；runner result、测试和 promotion gate 都应覆盖。

decisions.q: 是否把 Changelog Drafter workflow-dispatch 从 draft-plan 升级到 guarded live draft evidence 主路径？
decisions.answer: 同意。
decisions.note: 新增 confirm_live_draft input，固定短语 CREATE_CHANGELOG_DRAFT_PR_OR_EVIDENCE，默认 draft_mode=evidence；dogfood 主路径生成 draft-evidence artifact，不强制 draft-pr；支持 core_package=./tools/zj-loop-core；artifact upload 必须 if: always()，workflow summary 只在文件存在时 cat。

1-4-4-2.notes: Implementation updated: Changelog Drafter now has a guarded live-draft CLI, workflow_dispatch inputs for confirm_live_draft/core_package, artifact upload with if: always(), safe summary cat guards, and runner evidence emits final_changelog_acceptance=false. Promotion gate now only misses real workflow-dispatch dogfood evidence, which requires this workflow change to exist on a remote branch/PR before it can be run truthfully.

1-4-4-3.label: Draft Consumer Promotion Apply And Docs
1-4-4-3.notes: Promotion gate passed and was applied with fixed confirmation phrase. Changelog Drafter draft-request route now has maturity.runner=execution-ready while execution.mode remains report-only. Durable docs and dogfood state were updated with workflow-dispatch run 29247657726 and side-effect boundary evidence.

1-4-6.label: Changelog Drafter 自动产出 Draft Artifact 与 Draft PR

decisions.q: 1-4-6 的范围是重造 runner 还是补齐自动触发/编排链路？
decisions.answer: 补齐自动触发/编排链路，不重造 Changelog Drafter runner。现有 runner 已支持 guarded draft-evidence / draft-pr、固定确认短语、GitHub workflow、draft request replay 和 live runner 测试。
decisions.note: 目标链路收敛为 release-window signal -> Route Decision -> changelog-drafter-draft-request -> guarded live draft artifact / draft PR -> review artifact；GitLab live draft MR 继续明确拒绝，后续单独节点再提升。

decisions.q: Changelog Drafter 的自动产出默认生成 draft-evidence 还是 draft-pr？
decisions.answer: 默认生成 draft-evidence，允许显式升级到 draft-pr。
decisions.note: 默认路径以低风险 review artifact 为主；draft-pr 需要通过固定确认短语或 workflow input 显式选择 draft_mode=pr，避免 release/changelog 语义被过早写入 PR。

decisions.q: Changelog Drafter 的自动触发来源是只允许 workflow_dispatch，还是允许 release-window signal 自动进入？
decisions.answer: 两者都支持；主路径是 release-window signal 自动进入 Route Decision，workflow_dispatch 保留为手动 replay、dogfood、修复入口。
decisions.note: Route Decision 只生成 changelog-drafter-draft-request，不直接写 changelog、不创建 PR、不发布；副作用仍由 guarded runner 执行。

decisions.q: Changelog Drafter runner 是否必须只消费 changelog-drafter-draft-request？
decisions.answer: 必须。Runner 只消费 changelog-drafter-draft-request，不能直接消费 changelog-drafter-report 或 release-window signal。
decisions.note: 固定链路为 release-window signal -> Route Decision -> changelog-drafter-draft-request -> Changelog Drafter runner；report 只负责观察和记录，draft-request 才是进入副作用边界的 activation carrier。

decisions.q: Changelog Drafter 自动产出的结果证据主 truth 放在哪里？
decisions.answer: 两层都要，但主 truth 放 orchestration review artifact；zj-loop/changelog-drafter-state.md 只保存低成本状态摘要和可回放索引。
decisions.note: draft evidence / draft PR 是一次执行的 reviewable outcome，应绑定本次 orchestration；state 文件用于 dedupe、resume、历史索引，不承载完整结果。

decisions.q: Changelog Drafter 自动产出失败后是否自动重试？
decisions.answer: 不自动重试；生成 structured hard stop / escalation evidence。
decisions.note: 同一个 draft request 失败后停在可回放证据上，避免 release/changelog 链路循环；需要 retry 时创建新的 draft request，或由 human/automation 显式 resume。

decisions.q: 1-4-6 应拆成哪些可执行 slices？
decisions.answer: 拆成三片：1) Changelog Drafter ConsumerAdapter Review Artifact；2) Changelog Drafter Workflow Auto Draft Evidence；3) Changelog Drafter Docs And Release Gate Alignment。
decisions.note: 代码探索显示 runner 已存在，但 ConsumerAdapter 只注册 roadmap activation；GitHub workflow 只有输入 draft request 时才 live-draft，tag push 仍主要是 report。优先补 orchestration review artifact 主路径，再接 workflow 自动 draft evidence，最后更新 docs/gate。

1-4-5-1.label: Provider Parity Gap Inventory
1-4-5-1.notes: Implemented provider parity gap inventory: RouteStatus exposes provider_support and automation_model.provider_context; generated Route Table template and dogfood Route Table declare GitHub/GitLab provider_support for every route; provider parity gate now validates required providers, fixed status enum, evidence prefixes, and status-specific fields. Verification: tools/zj-loop-core npm test; scripts/validate-provider-parity-gate.test.mjs; tools/zj-loop-init npm test.

1-4-5-2.label: GitLab Generated CI Scaffold Parity

decisions.q: GitLab Generated CI Scaffold Parity 的完成标准是否从文件生成提升为生成后可自检为 provider-ready？
decisions.answer: 同意提升。完成标准是 GitLab scaffold 生成后，能通过确定性测试证明 Route Table、GitLab fragments、root include/readiness 输出、package pin、route dispatch、provider_support/provider_context 全部对齐。
decisions.note: provider_support 是 capability inventory，不改变 route authorization；scaffold health check 负责证明生成物可解释、可审计、可回放。

decisions.q: provider-ready 自检应该放在哪里？
decisions.answer: 同意不新增独立用户命令。优先固化到 zj-loop-init 生成/升级测试、generated/provider parity release gates，以及简洁 readiness 输出。
decisions.note: 用户不需要额外记忆一个新检查命令；发布门槛由 deterministic tests/gates 承担，zj-loop-init 输出只提供必要 next steps 和 readiness summary。

decisions.q: GitLab readiness 输出是否新增 JSON mode？
decisions.answer: 同意不新增 JSON mode。默认保持 human-readable summary，但增加固定 provider_ready 文本锚点，并由 tests/gates 验证。
decisions.note: 机器可读 truth 已在 Route Table 和 zj-loop-route status --json；init 输出只承担短反馈、固定锚点、next steps。

decisions.q: 已有 root .gitlab-ci.yml 时是否自动 patch include？
decisions.answer: 同意默认不修改已有 root .gitlab-ci.yml，--force 也不覆盖已有 root CI。provider-ready health 以 fragments、Route Table、fixed include guidance、readiness summary 成立；自动 patch root CI 不进入本节点。
decisions.note: root CI 是用户项目敏感编排入口；本节点只保证生成物和提示可审计，不越界重写用户 CI。

decisions.q: 已有 root .gitlab-ci.yml 时 --force 是否覆盖？
decisions.answer: 同意不覆盖。--force 可以覆盖 generated fragments，但不覆盖用户已有 root .gitlab-ci.yml；root CI 只输出 fixed include guidance。
decisions.note: 代码现状里 --add gitlab-ci --force 可能覆盖 root CI，1-4-5-2 实现时需要修正并加测试。

1-4-5-2.notes: Implemented GitLab generated CI scaffold parity: readiness summary now has fixed provider_ready anchor; add/upgrade tests prove generated Route Table provider_support and zj-loop-route status provider_context; --add gitlab-ci --force preserves existing root .gitlab-ci.yml while still allowing generated fragments to update; generated-bundle release gate now validates GitLab root include coverage, GitLab fragment pins, generated sentinels, stages, and dispatch route ids. Verification: cd tools/zj-loop-init && npm test; npm run test:generated-bundle-release-gate; npm run test:provider-parity-gate; roadmap validate.

1-4-5-3.label: Provider Adapter API Helpers

decisions.q: Provider Adapter API Helpers 的边界怎么定？
decisions.answer: 采用窄 helper 边界：只把跨 route 重复、且不会让 GitHub/GitLab 语义混淆的低层 helper 放进 @jununfly/zj-loop-core；包括 provider ref/URL helper、provider API base/auth/error helper、低成本 audit metadata helper；不做 generic Git provider 抽象，具体 route lifecycle 和 side effects 仍由 provider-specific runner/adapter 承担。
decisions.note: 保持 provider-specific adapter，避免其他 agent 误以为所有 Git 平台可无差异复用。

decisions.q: Provider helpers 是否立刻拆成 providers/github|gitlab|shared 目录？
decisions.answer: 暂不拆目录；本刀先扩展现有 public export 的 tools/zj-loop-core/src/providers.ts，新增共享类型和 provider-specific helper，并迁移当前重复最明显的 GitLab API URL/auth/error helper。等文件明显变大或 GitHub/GitLab helper 成组后，再用后续节点做目录拆分。
decisions.note: 保持 1-4-5-3 聚焦 helper 提炼，避免变成模块迁移；helper 命名保持 provider-specific，不做 generic Git provider。

decisions.q: Provider Adapter API Helpers 的 TDD 完成线包含哪些 helper？
decisions.answer: 采用四组完成线：ProviderApiRef/轻量 provider refs；GitLab API URL helper；GitLab auth/error helper；Provider audit metadata helper。只保存低成本审计字段，不保存完整 provider response。
decisions.note: 不新增 generic GitProvider interface；不把 issue/MR/branch/closeout 的具体副作用抽到公共 runner。

decisions.q: 实现时是否顺手改所有 provider-aware runner？
decisions.answer: 不全量铺开；本刀只改重复明显且 helper 化收益确定的调用点：post-merge-closeout-runner 迁出 GitLab API URL/auth/error helper，roadmap-activation-runner 复用 GitLab auth/API URL helper，补 provider.test.mjs。暂不批量改 ci-sweeper、pr-steward、dependency-sweeper、changelog-drafter，除非只是读取 audit metadata helper 且无行为变化。
decisions.note: 保持 1-4-5-3 聚焦 provider adapter API helpers，避免后续 agent 误以为所有 GitLab live parity 已完成。

1-4-5-3.notes: Completed with TDD. Public provider helpers now cover GitLab API URL construction, GitLab auth headers, GitLab failure reason strings, and low-cost provider audit metadata. post-merge-closeout and roadmap-activation reuse the shared helpers without introducing a generic Git provider abstraction. Verification: tools/zj-loop-core npm test; npm run test:provider-parity-gate; git diff --check; roadmap validate.

1-4-5-4.label: Route Family Provider Parity Evidence

decisions.q: Route Family Provider Parity Evidence 的目标是什么？
decisions.answer: 先做可审计证据清单和缺口分类，不在这一刀扩大 GitLab live 能力。产出应包括确定性脚本、测试、durable docs 更新，覆盖每个 route family 的 GitHub/GitLab evidence classification。
decisions.note: 不修改 route enablement、authorization 或 live runner maturity；避免把 evidence parity 误读为 live parity 已完成。

decisions.q: Route Family Provider Parity Evidence 的 truth source 是什么？
decisions.answer: 以 Route Table provider_support 为主 truth，但 evidence inventory 脚本必须交叉读取 deterministic evidence sources，而不是只复述声明。脚本应聚合 Route Table、GitHub/GitLab generated templates、GitLab provider dogfood replay、durable docs，输出每个 route family 的 provider parity 证据、缺口和下一步。
decisions.note: 不以 templates/docs/tests 任一单点作为唯一 truth；templates 只说明 CI surface，docs 易漂移，tests 目前不是每个 family 对称覆盖。

decisions.q: Route Family Provider Parity Evidence 应该落在哪里？
decisions.answer: 两层承载：确定性脚本输出可回放证据，durable docs 承载长期解释层。新增 scripts/route-family-provider-parity-evidence.mjs 默认输出 JSON，聚合事实字段；更新 docs/designs/provider-adapter-parity-architecture.md 的 Route Family Evidence Matrix，并引用脚本作为事实来源。
decisions.note: 不写入 runtime state，不放进 zj-loop/STATE.md；这是架构证据，不是运行队列或 triage state。

decisions.q: Route Family Provider Parity Evidence 是否并入 provider parity gate？
decisions.answer: 采用分层推进：先新增独立脚本 scripts/route-family-provider-parity-evidence.mjs 和测试，验证每个 route family 都有 GitHub/GitLab classification、evidence refs、gap/next step 字段；再把它纳入 npm run test:provider-parity-gate。Gate 不要求所有 route live-supported，只要求不允许无分类、无证据、无缺口说明。
decisions.note: 目标是防止 provider parity evidence 漂移，而不是把发布门槛升级成必须 live parity 全完成。

1-4-5-4.notes: Completed with TDD. Added route-family provider parity evidence inventory script and test, integrated it into provider parity gate, and documented the script/docs split. Verification: node --test scripts/route-family-provider-parity-evidence.test.mjs; npm run test:provider-parity-gate; node scripts/route-family-provider-parity-evidence.mjs; git diff --check; roadmap validate.

1-4-5-5.label: Provider Parity Release Gates And Docs

decisions.q: Provider Parity Release Gates And Docs 的完成标准是什么？
decisions.answer: 定义为发布前收口，不继续扩 GitLab live 能力。完成标准包括：provider parity gate 覆盖模板配对、package pin、Route Table provider_support、route-family evidence inventory、durable docs required phrases；CI/发布前验证链路能跑到该 gate；README/docs 明确 GitHub/GitLab 是 provider adapters 且 live side-effect maturity 不完全相同；provider parity architecture 的 Release Gate Expectations 提到 route-family-provider-parity-evidence.mjs。
decisions.note: 不新增 GitLab live runner 能力，不改 route enablement/authorization/maturity，不发布版本；本节点只做到 release-ready evidence。

decisions.q: CI/release gate 应该只跑脚本主逻辑还是完整 npm run test:provider-parity-gate？
decisions.answer: 采用完整 npm run test:provider-parity-gate。ci-validate-gates.sh 应复用该 npm script，而不是只执行 node scripts/validate-provider-parity-gate.mjs。这样 CI 同时覆盖 validate-provider-parity-gate.test.mjs、gitlab-provider-dogfood-replay.test.mjs、route-family-provider-parity-evidence.test.mjs 和 gate 主逻辑。
decisions.note: 确保 1-4-5-4 的脚本 + 测试 + gate 三件套不会在 CI 中漂移。

decisions.q: README/docs 还需要补什么以避免误导 GitLab 全量 live parity？
decisions.answer: 只做小补，不大改 README。英文 README 已有清晰 GitHub/GitLab Compared；中文 README 在 GitHub/GitLab provider parity 附近补充当前副作用边界：provider parity gate 验证的是每个 route family 有分类、有证据、有缺口说明，不表示 GitLab 所有 route 都已 live-supported；具体成熟度以 Route Table provider_support 和 route-family-provider-parity-evidence.mjs 输出为准。
decisions.note: 避免发布前用户心智误读，同时不重复展开已有英文 README 的完整对比表。

1-4-5-5.notes: Completed provider parity release gate/docs closeout. ci-validate-gates now runs npm run test:provider-parity-gate, which includes route-family provider parity evidence tests plus gate main logic. README.zh-CN clarifies provider parity does not mean all GitLab routes are live-supported. Provider parity architecture Release Gate Expectations now lists route-family evidence inventory. Verification: npm run test:provider-parity-gate; bash scripts/ci-validate-gates.sh; git diff --check.

1-4-6-1.label: Changelog Drafter ConsumerAdapter Review Artifact
1-4-6-1.notes: Implemented Changelog Drafter ConsumerAdapter review artifact path. dispatchSignal auto mode now writes zj-loop/orchestrations/<orchestration_id>/draft-plan.json for changelog-drafter-draft-request and hard-stops when payload.changelog_draft_request is missing. Verification: npm test --prefix tools/zj-loop-core -- --test-name-pattern 'Changelog Drafter'; bash scripts/ci-validate-gates.sh; git diff --check.

1-4-6-2.label: Changelog Drafter Workflow Auto Draft Evidence

decisions.q: Changelog Drafter workflow 自动产出应直接调用 runner CLI，还是主路径走 zj-loop-dispatch orchestration？
decisions.answer: 主路径走 zj-loop-dispatch structured orchestration；直接 runner CLI 只保留为低层调试/兼容入口。
decisions.note: Workflow 应构造 zj-loop.signal.v1，intent=draft_changelog，payload 带 changelog_draft_request，通过 zj-loop-dispatch --mode auto 生成 orchestration review artifact；只有显式进入 live runner 时才写 draft evidence 或 draft PR。

decisions.q: Workflow 是否默认直接执行 live-draft 写入 draft evidence？
decisions.answer: 默认只自动生成 draft-plan.json；只有提供固定确认短语 CREATE_CHANGELOG_DRAFT_PR_OR_EVIDENCE 时，才执行 live-draft 写入 draft-evidence。
decisions.note: draft-plan.json 是低风险 orchestration review artifact；draft-artifacts/changelog-draft.md 属于 repo 文件写入的 live side effect，并伴随 release 语义、循环、权限上下文和审计边界风险。

decisions.q: Workflow 没有 changelog_draft_request_json 时是否从 tag push / release-window 自动构造 draft request？
decisions.answer: 暂时不直接从 tag push 自动构造 draft request；必须先有 changelog-drafter-report 或等价 release-window report evidence，再生成 draft request。
decisions.note: Tag push 直接生成 draft request 会绕过 report-only 层，削弱 human gate、dedupe 和 release-window 风险判断；report -> draft-request 自动编排应作为独立路径处理。

decisions.q: 1-4-6-2 是否同步升级 GitLab CI fragment？
decisions.answer: 要，但只做到 orchestration draft-plan.json parity，不做 GitLab live draft MR。
decisions.note: GitHub workflow 与 GitLab CI fragment 都支持 changelog_draft_request_json -> zj-loop-dispatch auto -> draft-plan.json；GitHub 固定短语可继续 live-draft，GitLab live draft MR 继续明确拒绝，留给后续专门节点。

1-4-6-2.notes: Implemented workflow auto draft evidence orchestration path. GitHub workflow and GitLab CI fragment now turn changelog_draft_request_json into zj-loop.signal.v1, run zj-loop-dispatch --mode auto, and upload orchestration/draft-plan artifacts. Default remains draft-plan only; GitHub live-draft still requires CREATE_CHANGELOG_DRAFT_PR_OR_EVIDENCE; GitLab live draft MR remains unsupported. Verification: npm test --prefix tools/zj-loop-init -- --test-name-pattern 'github-actions|gitlab-ci'; npm run test:provider-parity-gate; bash scripts/ci-validate-gates.sh; git diff --check.

1-4-6-3.label: Changelog Drafter Docs And Release Gate Alignment

decisions.q: Changelog Drafter 文档定位是否从单纯 report-only 更新为三层路径？
decisions.answer: 是。文档应描述为 report-only route + request-only/orchestration draft-plan path + guarded live-draft runner。
decisions.note: 三层用户心智：1) changelog-drafter-report 只记录 release-window evidence；2) changelog-drafter-draft-request 通过 zj-loop-dispatch 生成 orchestration draft-plan.json review artifact；3) live-draft 仅固定确认短语后写 draft-evidence 或创建 draft-pr，且不 tag、不 release、不 publish。

decisions.q: Release gate 是否新增 Changelog Drafter orchestration workflow 硬检查？
decisions.answer: 要。Release gate 应检查 Changelog Drafter generated workflow/CI 通过 zj-loop-dispatch --signal changelog-signal.json --mode auto 生成 draft-plan.json，且 GitHub workflow 不得直接调用 zj-loop-changelog-drafter draft-plan。
decisions.note: 这是防止主 truth 分叉的架构边界；draft-plan.json 主路径必须是 orchestration review artifact，不能靠文档约束避免模板回退。

decisions.q: 1-4-6-3 是否同步更新 README？
decisions.answer: README 只做轻量更新，核心协议细节放 durable architecture docs。
decisions.note: README 告知用户 workflow/CI 可从 draft request 生成 orchestration draft-plan.json，live draft 需要固定确认短语；协议分层、truth placement、report -> draft request -> orchestration -> live-draft 边界放入 route-consumer-execution-architecture、dogfood-reference-case，必要时 route-table-architecture。

1-4-6-3.notes: Aligned Changelog Drafter documentation and release gate around the orchestration-first contract: report records release-window evidence, draft-request is consumed by zj-loop-dispatch into draft-plan.json, and live-draft remains guarded by the fixed phrase CREATE_CHANGELOG_DRAFT_PR_OR_EVIDENCE without tag/release/publish side effects. Release gate now checks GitHub/GitLab generated bundle boundaries so workflow templates keep using changelog-signal.json, zj-loop-dispatch --mode auto, and draft-plan.json evidence instead of direct draft-plan calls or GitLab live-draft exposure. Verification: node scripts/validate-generated-bundle-release-gate.mjs; npm run test:provider-parity-gate; bash scripts/ci-validate-gates.sh; git diff --check.
